questions.question_text: How many aromatic atoms are present in the structure of andrographolide (SMILES: CC1=CC2C(C1=C)CC3(C(C2(C)O)CCC4C3(CCC(C4)O)C)O)?
questions.verification_recipe: Use RDKit to count the number of aromatic atoms in the provided SMILES string.

questions.question_text: Between the necroptosis inhibitors Nec-1s (SMILES: O=C(Nc1ccc(cc1)C(=O)N2CCC(CC2)C)c3ccc(cc3)Br) and GSK'872 (SMILES: CC1=CC(=C(S1)C(=O)Nc2ccc(cc2)C3=NN(C(=O)C3)C)C), which molecule has a higher number of rotatable bonds?
questions.verification_recipe: Use RDKit to calculate the number of rotatable bonds for both SMILES strings and compare the values.

questions.question_text: What is the exact monoisotopic mass of the necroptosis inhibitor Nec-1s (SMILES: O=C(Nc1ccc(cc1)C(=O)N2CCC(CC2)C)c3ccc(cc3)Br)? Answer in Da, rounded to 4 decimal places.
questions.verification_recipe: Calculate the exact monoisotopic mass from the provided SMILES using RDKit.
